sentences.text: 'I will give you my wheelbarrow, so work harder.'
'Friends must say what they mean,' said the Miller.
Anyone can say nice things and try to please, but a true friend says hard things and does not mind causing pain.
If he is a true friend, he likes it because he knows he is doing good.
